title: More Composter Variants Ashen Compat
description: A resource pack that adapts More Composter Variants to the Ashen visual style.
body: Enhance your Minecraft world with this resource pack that adapts More Composter Variants to the Ashen visual style. Experience a darker, more atmospheric environment where the redesigned composter textures blend seamlessly with the eerie and mysterious aesthetic of Ashen, ensuring a cohesive and immersive gameplay experience.
